text:
Quick summary / CRM-style notes:
- Company: Silverdune builds an in-app product insights assistant for B2B SaaS customers (trial users -> paid). Mid-market customer base; fairly price sensitive but values reliability.
- Started with Redwood Hosted API to validate model choices and latency profile. Trial ran 3 weeks; dev team integrated widget into staging.
- Trial metrics: ~1.2M tokens total, avg token size ~120, peak QPS 14, median latency 220ms. Observed heavy tail on long-context documents (10% of calls but ~40% of token volume).
- Primary ask now: sizing & pricing for Dedicated reserved capacity. They want predictable per-request latency and to avoid noisy-neighbor surprises during feature launches.
- Security: require SSO (SAML), KMS for key management, audit logs with 90-day retention, and option for EU residency for some customers. SOC2 is required; they asked whether Redwood h...
